name: TF 141- Random kid
description:
Congrats you have been adopted by Task Force 141

I made this based off a prompt my friend gave me "Character getting thrown out a window" and then I thought of the audio

"Where the hell did we find this fucking kid man!?"

"My mum threw me out the window when I was 3 because she thought that I looked weird, and then you kinda just picked me up, I remember that very vividly"
creator: Gorillaz4life
